title: component 真实焊点评测与 ANSA V24.1.1 可视化

project.generalization_boundary: Results are single-dataset component evidence only and must not be presented as cross-part generalization.

global_rules.candidate_input_policy: Candidate generation reads only the registered primary model and frozen WeldParams; it must not read SPOT.step or any evaluation artifact.
global_rules.evaluation_policy: SPOT.step is evaluation-only and is parsed as 286 marker-ball centers.
completion_policy: A completed step updates DEVLOG.md and its pass state in the same commit.
Run full pytest after weld_core changes.
Run git diff --check before commit and require a clean working tree after commit.

steps.goal: Freeze component source roles, isolated output layout, matching thresholds, and ANSA marker semantics.
changes: Record component.step as the only candidate-generation input and SPOT.step as evaluation-only.
Record 286 expected marker centers, 10-mm primary matching, 5/20-mm sensitivity, and the dedicated run root.
State that ANSA output uses visual markers and is never an FE SPOTWELD claim.
steps.completion_commit: chore: freeze component weld evaluation contract

steps.goal: Generate component candidates from the primary STEP in an isolated managed run.
changes: Derive planar faces from component.step and run frozen default WeldParams.
Register faces, candidates, hashes, parameters, and run status in manifest.json.
steps.completion_commit: feat: create isolated component weld candidate run

steps.goal: Publish traceable real-weld TP/FP/FN metrics and point-level errors.
changes: Write weld_point_evaluation.json/.md with TP/FP/FN, precision, recall, F1, distance statistics, and sensitivity.
Write weld_point_error_analysis.json/.md with TP coordinates/distances/faces and FN/FP coordinates.
Require every summary count to equal its point-level classification count.

strict_tests.command: .venv\Scripts\python -c "import json; p='data/component-weld-evaluation'; print('inspect newest completed run under', p)"

steps.completion_commit: feat: evaluate component candidates against real welds

steps.goal: Build a reproducible ANSA-v24.1.1 marker visualization package.
changes: Write ansa_import_manifest.json, per-layer CSV files, and ansa/ansa_import.py.
Create TP_TRUTH, TP_CANDIDATE, FP_CANDIDATE, FN_TRUTH, and MATCH_LINK Sets with source IDs traceable to the error analysis.
Use points as visual markers only; do not create unvalidated FE spot-weld connectors.
steps.completion_commit: feat: package component weld evaluation for ANSA

steps.goal: Verify real ANSA import/open/save/reopen behavior and publish the final single-dataset conclusion.
changes: Resolve the installed ANSA v24.1.1 shortcut to its executable and execute the generated import script.
Record ANSA version, import/reopen status, created entity counts, logs, database path, and screenshots in ansa_render_validation.json/.md.
Fail if ANSA cannot import, save, reopen, match expected counts, or produce nonempty screenshots; then publish a conclusion JSON/Markdown without generalization claims.
steps.completion_commit: feat: verify component weld evaluation in ANSA
